case_title: CONNER, EDWARD J. TRUSTEE OF CONNER CHILDERN'S et al vs. MAHAFFY, ASSIGH et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNER, EDWARD J. TRUSTEE OF CONNER CHILDERN'S MOORE, DOUGLAS G. TRUSTEE CONNER CHILDERN'S TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT MAHAFFY, ASSIGH COHEN, FRANKLIN
